prompt: Fix parse_duration so combined units like '1h30m' return total seconds.

files.tests/test_duration.py:
import sys
from pathlib import Path
import unittest

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]))

from src.duration import parse_duration


class DurationTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_single_units(self):
        self.assertEqual(parse_duration("2h"), 7200)
        self.assertEqual(parse_duration("45m"), 2700)
        self.assertEqual(parse_duration("10s"), 10)

    def test_combined_units(self):
        self.assertEqual(parse_duration("1h30m"), 5400)
        self.assertEqual(parse_duration("2m10s"), 130)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    unittest.main()
